N
Nu-Map Docs
Developer Reference
← Back to Nu-Map
nu-map/documentation / src/

src/ ~9,000 lines

All application source code. Six layers that depend only inward: UI consumes Context, Context drives Core and Data, and all institution-specific behavior is isolated behind the ports/adapters boundary so the planner can be forked for any university.

Parent
Nu-Map root
Entry
main.jsx → App.jsx
Children
ports/, adapters/, context/, core/, data/, ui/

Children

interface contracts
ports/
Eight JSDoc-only files. Define the data shapes every institution adapter must provide — the contract boundary between app core and any university.
institution implementations
adapters/
Every institution-specific value and rule. Swap the import in config.js and the planner reconfigures for a different school.
layer
context/
InstitutionContext (adapter injection) + PlannerContext (all state) + ThemeContext (CSS vars). The bridge between UI and logic.
layer
core/
Pure domain logic: graduation checking, prereq evaluation, course normalization, semester grid, special term utilities.
layer
data/
I/O adapters: fetch courses, load majors, read/write localStorage. Each function takes port implementations as explicit parameters.
layer
ui/
12 React components. All consume PlannerContext via usePlanner() and institution config via usePort(). No prop drilling.

Layer dependency rules

graph LR UI["ui/\n12 components"] CTX["context/\nInstitutionContext\nPlannerContext\nThemeContext"] CORE["core/\npure functions"] DATA["data/\nI/O only"] PORTS["ports/\nJSDoc contracts"] ADAPT["adapters/\nnortheastern/\ngeneric/"] UI -->|"usePlanner()\nusePort()"| CTX CTX -->|"pure fn calls"| CORE CTX -->|"async I/O\n(ports as params)"| DATA ADAPT -->|"implements"| PORTS CTX -->|"wire()\nuseInstitution()"| ADAPT style UI fill:#ddf4ff,stroke:#0969da style CTX fill:#fbefff,stroke:#8250df style CORE fill:#dafbe1,stroke:#1a7f37 style DATA fill:#fff8c5,stroke:#9a6700 style PORTS fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#d97706 style ADAPT fill:#ffe4e6,stroke:#e11d48
Import direction. Core never imports React or adapters. UI never imports adapters directly — always via usePort().

Entry points: main.jsx + App.jsx

main.jsx is 4 lines — it mounts React in StrictMode and renders App.

App.jsx wraps the app in three nested providers in this order:

App() → JSX
Wraps everything in <InstitutionProvider adapter={institutionAdapter}>, then <ThemeProvider>, then <PlannerProvider>. InstitutionProvider must be outermost because PlannerContext calls useInstitution() internally. Inside those, PlannerApp renders the fixed-size shell and uses a ResizeObserver to compute uiScale = containerWidth / BASE_WIDTH so all pixel values in components can be written at one canonical desktop size.

File inventory

FileLayerLinesPurpose
main.jsx—4React root mount
App.jsx—~60Provider wrapper + uiScale
config.js—~5Single import that selects the active institution adapter
ports/IInstitution.jsPorts~15Identity metadata contract (id, name, storagePrefix…)
ports/ICalendar.jsPorts~20Semester types + weights contract
ports/ICreditSystem.jsPorts~15Credit unit naming + enrollment thresholds contract
ports/IAttributeSystem.jsPorts~20Gen-ed / NUPath grid + getCoverage() contract
ports/ISpecialTerms.jsPorts~20Co-op / internship types + attributeGrants contract
ports/IMajorRequirements.jsPorts~10fmtLabel / fmtLocation path helpers contract
ports/ICourseCatalog.jsPorts~10LOCAL_URL / API_URL data source contract
ports/ILocalization.jsPorts~10Disclaimers + UI copy contract
adapters/northeastern/Adapters~200NU reference implementation — 8 files, 1 per port
adapters/generic/Adapters~60Minimal no-op defaults for every port
adapters/wire.jsAdapters~15wire(overrides) — merges overrides on top of generic defaults
context/InstitutionContext.jsxContext~75Adapter injection — InstitutionProvider + usePort()
context/PlannerContext.jsxContext~1,600All application state
context/ThemeContext.jsxContext~65CSS variable injection
core/gradRequirements.jsCore~500Graduation requirement checking
core/prereqEval.jsCore~80Prerequisite satisfaction
core/courseModel.jsCore~120Course normalization + edges
core/semGrid.jsCore~80Semester grid generation
core/planModel.jsCore~200Plan helpers + PDF export
core/specialTermUtils.jsCore~40resolveTermByDuration, termSpans, computeGrantedAttrs
core/themes.jsCore~160CSS variable token sets
core/constants.jsCore~60Generic compile-time constants (colors, palette)
course loadingAdapter—Handled by courseCatalog.fetchAll() — no standalone module
data/majorLoader.jsData~50Fetch major requirements (takes majorRequirements port)
data/minorLoader.jsData~40Fetch minor requirements (takes majorRequirements port)
data/persistence.jsData~30localStorage read/write (takes storagePrefix)
ui/Header.jsxUI~780Top bar: controls, plan management, settings
ui/BankPanel.jsxUI~850Course bank + grad panel sidebar
ui/GradPanel.jsxUI~1,000Graduation requirement tree UI
ui/SemRow.jsxUI~850Semester row (fall/spring/special)
ui/SummerRow.jsxUI~850Paired summer semester columns
ui/CourseCard.jsxUI~500Draggable course tile
ui/InfoPanel.jsxUI~400Bottom drawer for selected course
ui/RelationLines.jsxUI~100SVG overlay for prereq/coreq lines
